title: Pan-Seared Apple Tart
description: A sweet and tangy dessert inspired by French cuisine, featuring a crispy pastry crust and a caramelized apple filling.

ingredients.name: tangy cheese
ingredients.notes: such as brie or goat cheese

instructions: Roll out the dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Transfer the dough to a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
In a large bowl, mix together the sliced apples, cinnamon, nutmeg, and sugar.
Arrange the apple mixture in a circular pattern, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Sprinkle the tangy cheese over the apples.
Fold the edges of the dough up over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
Bake the tart for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the apples are tender.
Remove the tart from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Serve warm, garnished with fresh herbs or whipped cream if desired.
